mapper.select: SELECT consultation_id, doctor_id, role, status, confirm_time FROM consultation_doctor WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId}
SELECT consultation_id, doctor_id, role, status, confirm_time FROM consultation_doctor WHERE consultation_id = #{consultationId} AND doctor_id = #{doctorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE consultation_doctor SET status = #{status}, confirm_time = NOW() WHERE consultation_id = #{consultationId} AND doctor_id = #{doctorId}
